description.value: Speak a one-word command to a creature you can see within close range. Target makes [[/save type=will]]. Compare your weaving successes to their save successes. If you have more, target follows the command on their next turn. Commands: Approach, Drop, Flee, Grovel (prone), Halt (no actions). Cannot command self-harm. Creatures immune to charm are immune.

system.weavingRoll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
